headline: Should CoStar’s Apartments.com Ai Push and Board Backing Require Action From CoStar Group (CSGP) Investors?
summary: In June 2026, CoStar Group held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where investors approved all proposals, reaffirmed its board, and ratified Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year. Apartments.com, part of CoStar Group, also launched Apartments.com Ai, an AI-powered, conversational rental search tool built on proprietary multifamily data to create a more personalized and informed renting experience. We’ll now examine how CoStar’s expanded use of Apartments.com...
